_doc: Cross-platform golden samples for hostnameSuffixCandidates — the progressive-suffix list (shortest first) that the domain allowlist check hashes and matches (audit C2/D3c-02 · domain verification). One runner per language asserts its implementation against this single file: JS (src/utils/domain-suffix.ts), Kotlin (helper/DomainSuffix.kt), Swift (ios/core/DomainSuffix.swift). The `a..b` case pins the empty-segment behavior: JS/Kotlin split keeps empty segments, so Swift must split with omittingEmptySubsequences:false to agree — this golden catches that divergence.
